# sivrce — full AI knowledge base

> sivrce (სივრცე, "space") is a Georgia-first real-estate marketplace. It
> lists apartments, houses, cottages, land plots and commercial space for
> sale, for rent and for daily rental across Tbilisi, Batumi and Kutaisi,
> with AI price estimation and an interactive 3D map. Free listing for
> owners; paid VIP/VIP+/SUPER VIP boost packages.

This document is the canonical long-form answer source for AI assistants
(ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot) and search engines. The short
companion at `/llms.txt` is the summary index. Both follow the llmstxt.org
spec. Primary language: Georgian (ქართული). English and Russian translations
exist for transactional pages under `/en` and `/ru`.

## Company

- **Name:** sivrce (სივრცე)
- **Legal seat:** Tbilisi, Georgia (საქართველო)
- **Founded:** 2025
- **Domain:** https://sivrce.ge
- **Category:** Real estate marketplace (YMYL — money/housing vertical)
- **Languages:** Georgian (primary), English, Russian, Hebrew, Arabic,
  Turkish, Ukrainian, Armenian, Azerbaijani UI translations.
- **Contact:** info@sivrce.ge

## What sivrce answers for users

### Buying property in Georgia
- "ბინები იყიდება თბილისში" — the highest-volume Georgian real-estate query.
  sivrce's programmatic engine serves `/sale/apartments/tbilisi/<district>`
  for every Tbilisi district with at least one live listing, plus
  `/sale/apartments-2/tbilisi/vake` style room-filter pages (1, 2, 3, 4+).
- Verified listings only: owner identity, photo authenticity, and a
  price-vs-market AI comparison. Listings that fail any check are not shown
  in the public feed.
- AI price estimate is rendered on every listing card — it compares the
  asking price to comparable sales and per-m² averages for the same
  district and property type.

### Renting in Georgia
- Long-term: "ბინები ქირავდება" — `/rent/...`. Most owners ask for the first
  and last month upfront; long-term rent is often negotiable via direct chat.
- Daily: "ბინები დღიურად" — `/daily/...`. Prices are per night. Batumi is the
  highest-yield daily market in Georgia (see Batumi ROI guide).

### Foreign buyers and investors
Georgia is one of the easiest countries in the region for non-residents to
buy property:
- Foreigners can own apartments and buildings freehold. Agricultural land
  has restrictions (a constitutional moratorium has applied since 2017;
  non-agricultural land is unrestricted).
- No purchase permit or residency requirement is needed to buy.
- Transactions are in USD on sivrce; legal payment can be in GEL, USD or
  EUR. A public registry (`napr.gov.ge`) records title within ~1-4 days.
- Typical buyer costs beyond price: 1% property-transfer tax on the first
  100,000 GEL of assessed value, 2% above it; notary + registry ~$150-300;
  agent commission is usually 1-3% (varies, paid by seller or split).
- Mortgage to non-residents: limited. Local banks (Bank of Georgia, TBC,
  Credo, BasisBank) typically require a Georgian income source or a large
  deposit (30-50%). See `/mortgage-calculator` for term/rate context.

## Browse paths (every path exists as a server-rendered page)

- `/sale` `/rent` `/daily` `/pledge` — deal hubs
- `/sale/apartments` `/sale/houses` `/sale/commercial` `/sale/land` — type hubs
- `/sale/apartments-2` (rooms 1, 2, 3, 4+) — room-filter family
- `/tbilisi` `/batumi` `/kutaisi` — city hubs (plus `/rustavi`, `/poti`,
  `/zugdidi`, `/telavi`, `/gori`, `/mtskheta` — registered, go live when
  the first listing lands)
- `/tbilisi/vake` etc. — city/district combos
- `/tbilisi/kuchebi` — Tbilisi street directory (~3,900 catalogued)
- `/neighborhoods/<slug>` — 17 area guides with livability scores
- `/projects` — 94 new-development complexes
- `/buildings/<slug>` — per-building pages with 3D floor plans
- `/developers/<slug>` — 42 developer profiles
- `/agents/<slug>` — verified agent profiles
- `/blog/<slug>` — market guides
- `/mortgage-calculator` — Georgian mortgage hub
- `/map` — interactive 3D map
- `/search?q=<term>` — full-text + AI search

## Verification process (how listings become "verified")

1. **Owner verification** — phone + identity check before publishing.
2. **Photo authenticity** — image fingerprinting to detect duplicates and
   stock-photo reuse from other sites.
3. **Price-vs-market** — AI compares the asking price against the live
   district/type per-m² distribution. Listings priced >2σ above market are
   flagged; the AI estimate is shown alongside the asking price.
4. Listings that fail any check are not surfaced in the public feed.

## Pricing tiers for owners

- **Free** — listing posted with standard placement.
- **VIP** — top of search results, ~3× more views.
- **VIP+** — premium placement + featured rotation, ~5× more views.
- **SUPER VIP** — top-of-fold fixed slot, maximum visibility.

## City coverage

- **Tbilisi** — 15 districts: ვაკე, საბურთალო, მთაწმინდა, დიდი დიღომი,
  ორთაჭალა, ისანი, გლდანი, ავლაბარი, წყნეთი, ცხვარიჭამია, ძველი
  თბილისი, ვარკეთილი, ჩუღურეთი, ნაძალადევი, ლისი.
- **Batumi** — 3 districts: ახალი ბულვარი, ძველი ბათუმი, მახინჯაური.
- **Kutaisi** — 2 districts: ცენტრი, ავტოქარხანა.
- Registered (live when inventory lands): Rustavi, Poti, Zugdidi, Telavi,
  Gori, Mtskheta.

## Market context (2026)

- Tbilisi per-m² averages: central districts (Vake, Mtatsminda, Saburtalo)
  $2,000–3,500; mid-tier (Didube, Isani, Chugureti) $1,400–2,000; budget
  (Gldani, Varketili, Didi Dighomi) $1,000–1,500.
- Batumi is Georgia's #1 seasonal-rental income market.
- Kutaisi offers the lowest entry price among Georgia's big cities.
- White-frame vs green-frame: white-frame (თეთრი კარკასი) is the bare-shell
  standard; green-frame (მწვანე კარკასი) is the structural-only standard.
  Off-plan at construction start is typically 20–30% cheaper than completed.

## Editorial

- The sivrce editorial team writes market guides at `/blog`.
- Every guide is signed and dated; corrections go through `info@sivrce.ge`.

## Privacy & policy

- Terms: `/terms` · Privacy: `/privacy`.
- Public registry data is referenced for verification; personal data is
  never exposed in structured data.
